title: Heyzeibo Magic Set - 60+ Magic Tricks for Kids, Magic Kit with Instruction for Boys, Girls, Toddlers, Beginners
features: EASY TO PERFORM TRICKS--This amazing childrens magic box is packed with 60+ tricks that can be mastered in minutes! The magic kit features so many easy-to-learn tricks and high-quality props including Mystical Magic Cards, Mind Reading Canisters, Ever-Changing Magic Box and more. These basic magic techniques can be extended to other forms of magic that can exercise your child's ability to think

DETAILED CLEAR EASY INSTRUCTION MANUAL--Comes with a detailed manual that contains every step to start with the magic props so that your kids can be a professional magicians quickly. Children can quickly learn how to perform according to the teaching. Of course, you can study with your children together, which can increase interaction with you and your kids
KIDS MAGIC PROPS--Made of high quality material. The edges of the toys are polished to ensure they will not hurt your child, designed for young hands, beginners and kids

GREAT GIFT FOR YOUR KIDS--Heyzeibo magic trick kit is a perfect gift for Birthday, Easter, Halloween, Christmas, Family Party, Children’s Day, Holidays, Thanksgiving, Vacation holiday, New Year,etc. Perfect for boys girls toddlers beginners ages 6 7 8 9 10 11 12
We look forward to hearing your honest opinion
description: Product Description Previous page RED BALL TURN TO BLUE BALL When you pull out the push cover of the red ball that was originally shown to the audience, the red ball turns blue. COME WITHOUT A TRACE The red ball can appear or hide freely, as if by magic. Next page
